title: QFINHUB Autonomous Escalation Rules — Phase 15.1
principle: Hermes MUST continue autonomous operations without Qasem input UNLESS a critical escalation trigger fires. Qasem should only see daily reports and exceptions.

escalate_immediately.description: Traffic has been marked OFF-TRACK for 7 consecutive days with no improvement trend
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem with full gap analysis and proposed strategy pivot

escalate_immediately.description: Google AdSense rejects the site or issues a policy warning
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem immediately — monetization pathway blocked

escalate_immediately.description: AdSense issues a warning about content, traffic quality, or policy violation
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem immediately — potential account risk

escalate_immediately.description: Google Search Console shows a manual action or security issue
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem immediately — site at risk of deindexing

escalate_immediately.description: Safe GSC UI automation blocked by CAPTCHA, 2FA, or session expiry that cannot be resolved
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem — re-authentication needed. Provide exact instructions.

escalate_immediately.description: A prospect replies and requires Qasem's personal decision (e.g., they want to negotiate, offer paid placement, or have questions only the owner can answer)
escalate_immediately.action: Forward the reply to Qasem with context and recommended response

escalate_immediately.description: A critical action requires a paid API, tool, or service not currently available
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem with cost/benefit analysis and recommendation

escalate_immediately.description: Content proposal involves financial advice, legal claims, tax advice, or regulated topics that could create liability
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem before publishing — owner must review

escalate_immediately.description: Major sitewide technical issue: sitemap broken (>10% URLs), canonical bug affects multiple pages, analytics completely down >1 day, build failures >2 consecutive days
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem with diagnosis and proposed fix

escalate_immediately.description: A high-value backlink opportunity requires negotiation (terms, guest post, partnership, widget placement agreement)
escalate_immediately.action: Alert Qasem with the opportunity details and recommended approach

do_not_escalate: Routine daily Tier 3 calculator GSC UI indexing (10/day)
Routine CTR fixes (on non-cooldown pages, max 10/day)

escalation_communication_format.title: 🚨 [ESCALATION TYPE]
sections: What happens if we don't act
